contact_change.action_type.label: FIRST: ('X' one box only) A. change of address / B. change of contact person and address / C. change of contact person / D. change in name of current contact person
contact_change.action_type.binding_source: independent checkboxes (on-state Yes); text labels by geometry: Check Box5 (x108,y329)='A. change of address'; Check Box9 (x324,y328)='B. change of contact person and address'; Check Box6 (x108,y364)='C. change of contact person'; Check Box8 (x324,y365)='D. change in name of current contact person'.

contact_change.current_address.widget_id: street city state and zip code
contact_change.current_address.label: SECOND: (street, city, state and zip code)

contact_change.new_name.widget_id: name of new contact person or new name of current contact person
contact_change.new_name.label: THIRD: (name of new contact person or new name of current contact person)

contact_change.new_physical_address.widget_id: physical location not PO Box  street city state and zip code
contact_change.new_physical_address.label: THIRD: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)

contact_change.new_mailing_address.widget_id: mailing address if different from above
contact_change.new_mailing_address.label: THIRD: (mailing address if different from above)
